attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 ST.TRANSACTION_ID ,
 ST.APPLICATION_NAME ,
 ST.APPLICATION_ID ,
 ST.LEDGER_ID      ,
 ST.ORG_ID         ,
 ST.TRX_CLASS,
 ST.ORDER_LINE_ID,
 ST.TRX_LINE_ID,
 ST.AMOUNT,
 ST.QUANTITY_INVOICED  AS ORDER_QUANTITY,
 ST.CURRENCY_CODE,
 ST.PROCESS_STATUS,
 ST.ELEMENT_TYPE   ,
 ST.RULE_START_DATE,
 ST.RULE_END_DATE  ,
 ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION ,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE1,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE2,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE6,
 ST.SKU,
 ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,  
 ST.TRANSACTION_SOURCE, 
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM   , 
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 ST.ATTRIBUTE12,  /*prmaddal : Added OA_ATTRIB_ID as part of Q1FY17 */
 ST.ATTRIBUTE13,  /*prmaddal : Added ATTRIB_ID as part of Q1FY17 */
ST.PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID,
 ST.ATTRIBUTION_CODE,
 ST.BUNDLE_TYPE,
 ST.PARENT_SUB_SKU_OFFSET_ID,
 'Y' AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_OA_S  ST
 WHERE  NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_OA_S  EL
 WHERE 
 EL.TRANSACTION_ID= ST.TRANSACTION_ID      
 AND EL.APPLICATION_ID = ST.APPLICATION_ID
 AND EL.ATTRIBUTE2=ST.ATTRIBUTE2 
AND EL.APPLICATION_NAME='CISCO NRS TRANSITION'
 )
